prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Here's a short pep talk for you:

"Listen, I know this task has been looming over you all morning, and it's easy to keep putting it off. But here's the thing: you've got this! You're capable, you're strong, and you're ready to tackle this challenge head-on.

Remember, the hardest part is usually just getting started. Once you dive in, you'll find your rhythm and your motivation will kick in. You'll be amazed at how much you can accomplish when you focus and give it your all.

So, take a deep breath, square your shoulders, and remind yourself that you're in control. You're not going to let this task intimidate you - you're going to crush it! You've overcome tough challenges before, and you can do it again.

Go ahead, take that first step, and watch how everything starts to fall into place. You've got this, and you're going to come out on top. Let's do this!"
